zh.Little Easton, Essex, England: 英國艾可蕾托 伊斯頓
zh.Ottignies-Louvain-la-Neuve, Walloon Brab: 比利時布拉班特 瓦隆奧迪尼尼-盧瓦-拉-福
zh.Louvain, Brabant, Lorraine, France: 法國洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Godfrey de Louvain於大約1175年出生在法國洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯時，他的父親Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen34歲，母親Imagina van Loon-Rieneck32歲。他於1194年與Lady Alice de Hastings在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1226年4月26日在英國素福爾可艾也享年52歲。

zh-hans.Little Easton, Essex, England: 英国艾可蕾托 伊斯頓
zh-hans.Ottignies-Louvain-la-Neuve, Walloon Brab: 比利时布拉班特 瓦隆奧迪尼尼-盧瓦-拉-福
zh-hans.Louvain, Brabant, Lorraine, France: 法国洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godfrey de Louvain于大约1175年出生在法国洛萊姆斯布拉班吉素-斯时，他的父亲Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen34岁，母亲Imagina van Loon-Rieneck32岁。他于1194年与Lady Alice de Hastings在英国諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1226年4月26日在英国素福爾可艾也享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Godfrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French name Godefroy, which is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from god ‘god’ (or gōd ‘good’) + fred, frid ‘peace’. This was adopted by the Normans, and brought to England by immigrants from the Low Countries and France. It was borne by a Norman saint ( c.1066–1115 ) who became bishop of Amiens. There has been considerable confusion with Geoffrey .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Godfrey de Louvain was born about 1175, in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, was 34 and his mother, Imagina van Loon-Rieneck, was 32. He married Lady Alice de Hastings in 1194, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 26 April 1226, in Eye, Suffolk, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godfrey de Louvain est né environ 1175, à Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Imagina van Loon-Rieneck, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice de Hastings en 1194, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 avril 1226, à Eye, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godfrey de Louvain um 1175 in Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen 34 und seine Mutter Imagina van Loon-Rieneck 32. Er hat 1194 in Northumberland, England Lady Alice de Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. April 1226 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Eye, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godfrey de Louvain è nato il circa 1175 nel Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Imagina van Loon-Rieneck, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice de Hastings nel 1194, nel Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 aprile 1226, nel Eye, Suffolk, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.Louvain, Brabant, Lorraine, France: フランスロレィヌメウゼブラバント-スル-メウゼ

ja.Eye, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクエイ
ja.lifeSummary: Godfrey de Louvainが約1175年にフランスロレィヌメウゼブラバント-スル-メウゼで生まれた時，父Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingenは34歳，母Imagina van Loon-Rieneckは32歳であった。1194年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでLady Alice de Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1226年4月26日にイギリススフォルクエイで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Godfrey de Louvain(이)가 대략 1175년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 브라반트-수-우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Imagina van Loon-Rieneck(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1194년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Lady Alice de Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1226년 4월 26일 영국 수폴크 예에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godfrey de Louvain nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Imagina van Loon-Rieneck, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice de Hastings em 1194, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de abril de 1226, em Eye, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godfrey de Louvain родился около 1175 г. в местности брабант-сур-меус, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Imagina van Loon-Rieneck, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice de Hastings в 1194 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 апреля 1226 г. в местности эи, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godfrey de Louvain nació aproximadamente 1175, en Brabant-sur-Meuse, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Godfried III van Leuven-Brabant hertog van Neder-Lotharingen, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Imagina van Loon-Rieneck, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Lady Alice de Hastings en 1194, en Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de abril de 1226, en Eye, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
